description: This file implements a document extraction service that processes various file formats (PDF, DOCX, TXT, DOC) to extract text content, supporting optional dependencies for PDF and DOCX parsing, and providing a unified interface for text extraction.

methods.name: _decodeToText
methods.description: Decodes a buffer to UTF-8 text, used for text extraction.

methods.name: _normalizeNewlines
methods.description:
Normalizes newline characters in text to '
'.

methods.name: extractTextFromUploadedFile
methods.description: Main function that extracts text from uploaded files based on mime type and filename, supporting PDF, DOCX, TXT, and DOC formats.
